children.name: value
children.title: Product Description
children.description: Provide a text description of the product. This information will appear in paragraph form on the detail page of your product. Include unique product features, product line details, and product specifications. Do not use all caps.

fields.title: Description
fields.description: A text description of the product. If you see #### signs where you should see the text, clear the format of the cell. This can be done by clicking Edit in main menu, select Clear & then Formats.

fields.name: bullet_point

children.name: value
children.title: Bullet Point
children.description: Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviations. Please do NOT use for fabric content, care instructions or country as these are populated in different fields.

fields.title: Bullet Point
fields.description: Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Bullet points will be inserted automatically.

fields.name: generic_keyword

children.name: value
children.title: Generic Keyword
children.description: Provide any terms that may be relevant to customer searches. No repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.

fields.title: Search Terms
fields.description:
A word or phrase that best describes the product. This will help Amazon.com locate the product when customers perform searches on our site.

This is in addition to the valid values that you must submit for your product.  It is in your best interest to fill in all search terms.

Select “in equipment” if the battery is contained in the item

children.title: Compliance Media Source Location
children.description: Provide the URL where your product document is stored. This must be a direct download link, not a link that opens the PDF in a browser.

fields.title: Compliance Media
fields.description: Provide information on the product documents you want to display on the product detail page to comply with the General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR). Alternatively, you can upload images under the PS01-PS06 variants in the Image Manager.

fields.title: Safety Attestation

children.description: Provide the email or URL of the manufacturer. If you’ve submitted this information for the brand before, use the same email or URL.

fields.description: Provide the email address or URL of the manufacturer to comply with the EU General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR). If you’ve already submitted this manufacturer’s information in the past, make sure you use the same email or URL.

linkageRules.condition: ((battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'lithium_ion' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'lithium_metal' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'lithium_polymer' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'sodium_ion') && battery.0.cell_composition.0.value != null && parentage_level.0.value != 'parent')

fields.name: battery_contains_free_unabsorbed_liquid

children.name: value
children.title: Battery Contains free Unabsorbed Liquid
children.description: Provides certification that your battery meets transport regulations for free-flowing liquid: no unabsorbed liquid at 55°C & no leakage.

fields.title: Battery Contains free Unabsorbed Liquid
fields.description: Provides certification that your battery meets transport regulations for free-flowing liquid: no unabsorbed liquid at 55°C & no leakage.

fields.name: is_battery_non_spillable

children.name: value
children.title: Is Battery Non Spillable
children.description: Provides certification confirming your battery meets transport regulations for non-spillable status, including vibration and pressure tests

fields.title: Is Battery Non Spillable
fields.description: Provides certification confirming your battery meets transport regulations for non-spillable status, including vibration and pressure tests

fields.name: non_lithium_battery_packaging

children.name: value
children.title: Non-Lithium Battery Packaging
children.description: Provide "in equipment" for batteries installed in devices, "with equipment" for those packed separately with the device, and "only" for standalone batteries.

fields.title: Non-Lithium Battery Packaging
fields.description: Provide "in equipment" for batteries installed in devices, "with equipment" for those packed separately with the device, and "only" for standalone batteries.

linkageRules.condition: (battery.0.cell_composition.0.value != null && (battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'NiCAD' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'alkaline' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'lead_acid' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'wet_alkali' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'other_than_listed' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'NiMh' || battery.0.cell_composition.0.value == 'sodium_ion') && parentage_level.0.value != 'parent')
